message:
fix(extensions,tests): use struct initialization syntax and apply const fn + clone lint fixes

src/extensions.rs:
- Replace field-then-assign pattern with struct initialization syntax
  for ExtensionQuotaState in quota_subprocess_limit_enforced and
  quota_write_bytes_limit_enforced tests (idiomatic Rust style, avoids
  partial initialization).

tests/runtime_risk_quantile_evidence.rs:
- Change make_risk_config() from fn to const fn for compile-time eval.
- Remove unnecessary .clone() on Copy type (selected_action) in
  conformal determinism test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
